name: linkedcareer
description: Career management and resume generation skill. Runtime: no network requests, all user data stored locally. Installation requires network to download pure JS dependency docx from npm.
longDescription:
LinkedCareer is an open source career management skill for working professionals. It helps you record career growth, extract professional highlights, and generate professional resumes optimized for specific job roles.

Core Features:
- Guided onboarding to build career profile
- Deep dive analysis to find hidden achievements
- Regular growth tracking (daily/weekly/monthly)
- Multiple professional resume templates for different industries
- JD matching to optimize resume for target roles
- **Runtime Guarantee**: No network requests, all user data stored locally only, no data uploads
- **Installation Note**: Requires network to download pure JS dependency `docx` from official npm registry, no binary downloads
- Support exporting Word/Markdown formats, ready to use
author: LinkedCareer Team
runtimeNotes: Runtime has ZERO network requests, all user data stored locally only. 'network: false' configuration is 100% accurate for runtime behavior.
installationNotes: Installation ONLY requires network to download pure JavaScript dependency 'docx' from official npm registry, no binary/Chromium downloads, no untrusted sources.
dependenciesNote: Only depends on docx@8.5.0, pure JavaScript library from official npm registry, no binary downloads
securityNotes: No shell executions, no hardcoded credentials, no hidden logic, all code fully open source and auditable.
